name: CMake
help: The cmake executable is the command-line interface of the cross-platform build system generator CMake.

tasks.help: Generates a build project using cmake.

properties.name: Generator
properties.help: Specify the build system to generate.

properties.name: Platform
properties.help: Specify the platform to build for.

properties.name: RootDirectory
properties.help: Specify the root directory of the 'CMakeLists.txt' file.

properties.name: OutputDirectory
properties.help: Specify the configuration to use when running the install script.

properties.name: ToolChain
properties.help: Specify the path to a toolchain file to use.

properties.name: ToolsetSpec
properties.help: Specify the toolset name if supported by the generator.

properties.name: InstallPrefix
properties.help: Specify the installation prefix to be used in the generated project.

properties.name: Define
properties.help: Create or update a CMake cache entry, in the form <var>[:<type>]=<value>.

properties.name: Undefine
properties.help: Remove matching entries from the CMake cache, given a globbing expression.

properties.name: Fresh
properties.help: Perform a fresh configuration, removing any existing cache file.

properties.name: WarnDev
properties.help: Enable developer warnings.

properties.name: NoWarnDev
properties.help: Suppress developer warnings.

properties.name: WarnUninitialized
properties.help: Warn about uninitialized values.

properties.name: WarnUnusedVars
properties.help: Warn about unused variables.

properties.name: LogLevel
properties.help: Set the log level to one of: ERROR, WARNING, NOTICE, STATUS, VERBOSE, DEBUG, TRACE.

properties.name: Debug
properties.help: Put cmake in a debug mode.

properties.name: Trace
properties.help: Put cmake in trace mode.

properties.name: TraceExpand
properties.help: Put cmake in trace mode, expanding variables.

tasks.help: Runs the `cmake --build` command on a project generated with cmake.

properties.name: OutputDirectory
properties.help: Specify the project binary directory to build.

properties.name: Configuration
properties.help: Specify the build configuration for multi-config generators.

properties.name: Target
properties.help: Specify the targets to build instead of the default target.

properties.name: Parallel
properties.help: Specify the maximum number of concurrent processes to use when building.

properties.name: CleanFirst
properties.help: Build target 'clean' first, then build.

properties.name: Verbose
properties.help: Enable verbose output - if supported - including the build commands to be executed.

properties.name: NativeToolOptions
properties.help: Pass remaining options to the native build tool, placed after '--'.

tasks.help: Runs the `cmake --install` command on a project generated with cmake.

properties.name: RootDirectory
properties.help: Specify the root directory of the cmake install script.

properties.name: Configuration
properties.help: Specify the root directory of the 'CMakeLists.txt' file.

properties.name: OutputDirectory
properties.help: Specify the output directory of the install script.

properties.name: Component
properties.help: Specify the component to install.

properties.name: Strip
properties.help: Strip before installing.

properties.name: Verbose
properties.help: Enable verbose output.
